title: Official Monumenta Modpack
description: The official modpack for the Monumenta Minecraft server, including the Monumenta resource packs! Includes modifications needed to use custom Monumenta textures.
body:
# The Official Monumenta Modpack
**The Official Monumenta Modpack** is a developer-made modpack for the CTMMMORPG Minecraft server [Monumenta](https://modrinth.com/server/monumentammo). **This modpack is not a requirement to join or play on Monumenta.**

The modpack includes the official texture and music packs, the mods required by the texture pack, common performance mods, and some quality-of-life features. It is meant to be easy to use and bloat-free for players unfamiliar with Minecraft modding and Monumenta.

To install, get the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) and search up the modpack inside. Click Install, then Play. Check out the [wiki page](https://github.com/Spy21DD/spys-monumenta-modpacks/wiki) for a step-by-step tutorial.

### Content Glossary
A brief overview of the most notable content of this modpack. Mods not listed below are for performance and utility purposes.
- [Monumenta MMO Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/monumenta-mmo-resource-pack): The official resource pack for Monumenta's items, NPCs, GUIs, and more.
- [Monumenta Music Pack](https://files.playmonumenta.com/resource-packs/MonumentaMusicPack.zip): The official resource pack for enabling Monumenta's soundtrack in-game.
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), [Entity Texture Features (ETF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features (EMF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features): The three mods required by the Resource Pack to work. CIT Resewn enables custom item textures, and the latter two enable custom mob textures and models. Note that item textures will not work with CIT Resewn versions newer than v1.1.5.

### Acknowledgements
The GitHub repository does not contain any code or binary files of any Minecraft modifications to prevent licensing issues; rather it contains the configuration and metadata files that are packed into the .mrpack installation archive which are updated when the modpack is updated.
- This modpack was formerly called Spy's Lightweight Monumenta. It takes inspiration from [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive), [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), and many community-made modpacks. This modpack is licensed under CC Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International and uses open-source or source-available modifications.
- Versions below 2.\*.\* contain a prebuilt version of CIT Resewn that fixes FPS drops caused by the mod refreshing the cache too quickly. CIT Resewn is licensed under the MIT license. Please read this [Pull Request](https://github.com/SHsuperCM/CITResewn/pull/262) for more information and to see what code was changed.
- Versions 1.1.0+ include the [Monumenta Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/monumenta-mmo-resource-pack) as an embedded link. This is the recommended way to keep your resource pack up to date.
- Versions 0.2.0 through 1.0.0 include the [Monumenta Resource Pack](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/monumenta-mmo-resource-pack) as a file. You may view the Creative Commons "Attribution-Share Alike" by opening the included LICENSE.txt file. A full list of credits is included in the CREDITS.txt file.
- This modpack includes the [Monumenta Music Pack](https://files.playmonumenta.com/resource-packs/MonumentaMusicPack.zip). You may view the Creative Commons "Attribution-Share Alike" by opening the included LICENSE.txt file. A full list of credits is included in the CREDITS.txt file.
- Many thanks to [Vladomeme](https://github.com/Vladomeme) for his work on Vlado's Gross Hacks and his well-cited [Gist](https://gist.github.com/Vladomeme/23a215bb211c64bff74ef702302f347e) on how to set up an environment for Monumenta, which has been adapted extensively for the wiki.
- Many thanks to [U5B](https://github.com/U5B) for his work on [USBPlus](https://github.com/U5B/usbplus) and the pre-merge Non-OptiFine Monumenta Resource Pack.
